window_summary: This window tracks the recent TryGhost/Ghost release stream from v6.19.4 through v6.43.1, covering bug fixes, new features like retention offers, gift subscriptions, pinned and threaded comments, and various admin and theme improvements.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: TryGhost/Ghost
Release: 6.19.4
Tag: v6.19.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-02T15:26:08Z; created_at: 2026-03-02T15:16:51Z
Release notes:
* 🐛 Fixed file upload content type passthrough to storage adapter (#26637) - Princi Vershwal
* 🐛 Fixed missing permission checks in paginated query hooks - Rob Lester
* 🐛 Fixed last_seen being modifiable via User API (#26350) - Leif Singer
* 🐛 Fixed invisible comments filter dropdown in Safari (#26484) - Kevin Ansfield
* 🌐 Added new Turkish translations for Comments, Ghost, Portal (#25978) - Turab
* ⚡ Optimized comment count subquery to avoid full table scan (#26624) - Steve Larson
---
View the changelog for full details: https://github.com/tryghost/ghost/compare/v6.19.3...v6.19.4
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the TryGhost/Ghost release 6.19.4, the release note includes fixes for file upload content type passthrough to storage adapter, missing permission checks in paginated query hooks, last_seen being modifiable via User API, and an invisible comments filter dropdown in Safari. It also adds new Turkish translations for Comments, Ghost, and Portal, and optimizes the comment count subquery to avoid a full table scan.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the TryGhost/Ghost release 6.21.0, the release note expands available cards in the welcome email editor, fixes double-prefixed asset URLs when using CDN, fixes the contributor user menu Posts link navigating to the wrong route, fixes the contributor posts list not being scrollable, fixes missing server-side label search in recipient and segment selects, and fixes #-prefixed member label select ordering when scrolling.

Repository: TryGhost/Ghost
Release: 6.22.0
Tag: v6.22.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-13T15:43:41Z; created_at: 2026-03-13T15:34:10Z
Release notes:

* 🎨 Added separate Server and Admin build versions to About dialog (#26769) - Rob Lester

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the TryGhost/Ghost release 6.22.0, the release note adds retention offers, adds separate Server and Admin build versions to the About dialog, fixes N+1 queries and broken reply limit in the comments API, fixes bookmark filtering in the Welcome Emails editor, and fixes a race condition in the reply-to-reply comment form.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: TryGhost/Ghost
Release: 6.22.1
Tag: v6.22.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-20T15:25:05Z; created_at: 2026-03-20T15:15:26Z
Release notes:
* 🔒 Added file type validation and content-type control for file uploads (#26869) - Princi Vershwal
* 🎨 Updated Source to v1.5.2 - Ghost CI
* 🎨 Updated Casper to v5.10.1 - Ghost CI
* 🎨 Updated private page access and signup flow (#26762) - John O'Nolan
* 🎨 Changed email verification error messages to be configurable via hostSettings (#26631) - Jannis Fedoruk-Betschki
* 🐛 Fixed font rendering when converting SVGs with text elements to PNG format (#26863) - Chris Raible
* 🐛 Fixed "labels is not defined" error when creating comped members via API (#26837) - Troy Ciesco
* 🐛 Fixed translations for Inbox Links button (#26839) - Evan Hahn
* 🐛 Fixed domain warming when warming has completed (#26817) - Sam Lord
* 🌐 Added missed string wrapping for Portal's offer page (#26884) - Cathy Sarisky
* 🌐 Added new Chinese language strings (#26871) - tommywong-theinitium
---
View the changelog for full details: https://github.com/tryghost/ghost/compare/v6.22.0...v6.22.1
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the TryGhost/Ghost release 6.22.1, the release note adds file type validation and content-type control for file uploads, updates Source to v1.5.2 and Casper to v5.10.1, updates private page access and signup flow, changes email verification error messages to be configurable via hostSettings, fixes font rendering when converting SVGs with text elements to PNG format, fixes a 'labels is not defined' error when creating comped members via API, fixes translations for Inbox Links button, fixes domain warming when warming has completed, adds missed string wrapping for Portal's offer page, and adds new Chinese language strings.

Repository: TryGhost/Ghost
Release: v6.33.0
Tag: v6.33.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-24T17:33:59Z; created_at: 2026-04-24T15:37:31Z
Release notes:
* 🎨 Added Preview tab to welcome email editor by @cmraible in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/27399
* 🐛 Fixed mobile issues with Portal share modal by @peterzimon in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/27501
* 🐛 Fixed scheduled email-only posts to require newsletter reference. by @markstos in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/24517
* 🐛 Prevented Escape keypresses in welcome emails Customize modal from exiting settings by @cmraible in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/27516
* 🐛 Fixed appearance of some welcome email image captions by @EvanHahn in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/27486
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/compare/v6.32.0...v6.33.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the TryGhost/Ghost release v6.33.0, the release note adds a Preview tab to the welcome email editor, fixes mobile issues with the Portal share modal, fixes scheduled email-only posts to require a newsletter reference, prevents Escape keypresses in the welcome emails Customize modal from exiting settings, and fixes the appearance of some welcome email image captions.

chunks.title: v6.36.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: TryGhost/Ghost
Release: v6.36.0
Tag: v6.36.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-01T15:41:36Z; created_at: 2026-05-01T15:29:35Z
Release notes:
* 🎨 Added direct access-code entry for private sites - Jonatan Svennberg
* 🎨 Moved private site controls into Access settings (#27390) - John O'Nolan
* 🐛 Fixed RTL languages rendering left-to-right in newsletter emails (#27357) - Jannis Fedoruk-Betschki
* 🐛 Declared lodash as a phantom dep in apps/admin - Rob Lester
* 🐛 Preserved trailing slashes inside admin redirect query values - Rob Lester
* 🐛 Fixed admin deep-link redirect when URL has a trailing slash - Rob Lester
* 🐛 Fixed What's New banner breaking on null changelog fields - Rob Lester
* 🐛 Fixed missing favicon and apple-touch-icon in React admin (#27528) - leafwind
* 🐛 Added missing empty state for members (#27463) - Weyland Swart
* 🐛 Fixed member import tier mapping (#27612) - Jonatan Svennberg
* 🐛 Fixed Popover leaking Escape to ancestor dismissable layers - Rob Lester
---
View the changelog for full details: https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/compare/v6.35.0...v6.36.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the TryGhost/Ghost release v6.36.0, the release note adds direct access-code entry for private sites, moves private site controls into Access settings, fixes RTL languages rendering left-to-right in newsletter emails, declares lodash as a phantom dep in apps/admin, preserves trailing slashes inside admin redirect query values, fixes admin deep-link redirect when URL has a trailing slash, fixes What's New banner breaking on null changelog fields, fixes missing favicon and apple-touch-icon in React admin, adds missing empty state for members, fixes member import tier mapping, and fixes Popover leaking Escape to ancestor dismissable layers.

chunks.title: v6.37.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: TryGhost/Ghost
Release: v6.37.0
Tag: v6.37.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-07T16:11:53Z; created_at: 2026-05-07T16:05:27Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* 🌐 Updated Vietnamese translations by @honhatduy in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/27597
* 🌐 Bulgarian translation updates by @yovko in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/27555
* 🎨 Expanded file upload allowlist with non-executable formats by @betschki in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/27677
* 🐛 Tolerated absolute and pre-prefixed paths in S3Storage by @rob-ghost in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/27671
* ✨ Added admin UI for publication social accounts by @JohnONolan in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/27396
* 🐛 Fixed newsletter reply-to verification links failing after signin by @9larsons in https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/pull/27660
* 🐛 Fixed second label filter creating duplicate filters on each toggle by @rob-ghost in
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost/compare/v6.36.0...v6.37.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the TryGhost/Ghost release v6.37.0, the release note updates Vietnamese and Bulgarian translations, expands the file upload allowlist with non-executable formats, tolerates absolute and pre-prefixed paths in S3Storage, adds admin UI for publication social accounts, fixes newsletter reply-to verification links failing after signin, and fixes a second label filter creating duplicate filters on each toggle.

questions.query_text: Across the TryGhost/Ghost releases, how does the comment-related change in v6.42.0 differ from the comment-related change in v6.39.0?

options.text: v6.42.0 releases pinned and threaded comments, while v6.39.0 changes comments to be enabled by default.
v6.42.0 adds comment dislikes, while v6.39.0 removes comments entirely.
Both releases only fix comment thread connector lines.
v6.42.0 disables comments, while v6.39.0 adds a built-in theme code editor.
